footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is an unofficial open-source tool and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the LCSD.
footer.copyright: Made with ❤️ by the open source community

about.title: About SmartPlay HK OSS
about.subtitle: Empowering Hong Kong's sports community with open technology

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: SmartPlay HK OSS exists because the official website is difficult to navigate, imposes unnecessary restrictions (such as the 5-district limit), and lacks essential features. We believe finding a place to play shouldn't be a hassle.

mechanism.title: How it Works
mechanism.description: This tool acts as a specialized browser that efficiently scans the official LCSD SmartPlay system for open slots. It aggregates this data in real-time to provide you with a unified view of availability across all districts.

items.q: Is this an official government website?
items.a: No, this is an open-source project created by the community. It is NOT affiliated with the Leisure and Cultural Services Department (LCSD).

items.q: Can I book facilities directly here?
items.a: No. This site is for checking availability only. You must go to the official SmartPlay website to make actual bookings.
Yes, but there might be a slight delay as we fetch data periodically to avoid overloading the official servers.

items.q: Do you store my SmartPlay login credentials?
items.a: We do not store any of your personal SmartPlay login credentials. All data processing happens locally in your browser or through our transparent open-source backend.

items.q: What is a Webhook and how do I use it?
items.a: A Webhook allows you to receive real-time notifications on external platforms like Discord or Slack. Simply provide the Webhook URL from your platform settings, and we'll send you an alert as soon as a slot becomes available.

items.q: How does the Watcher system work?
items.a: The Watcher automatically scans for your desired facility slots at regular intervals. When the availability status changes (e.g., from Full to Available), it triggers a notification so you can book immediately.

items.q: Which platforms are supported for notifications?
items.a: We natively support formatted messages for Discord and Slack. You can also use a generic endpoint to receive raw JSON data for custom integrations.
